---
title: "Resume"
toc: false
page-layout: article
---

<div style="max-width: 850px; margin: 0 auto;">

## Jessica Danielle Geiger

**Data Scientist | Drug Discovery & Machine Learning | Life Sciences**

<div style="text-align: center; margin: 40px 0 30px 0;">

<a href="/static/resume/resume.pdf" download class="btn btn-primary">
Download Resume (PDF)
</a>

<a href="/static/resume/resume.docx" download class="btn btn-secondary" style="margin-left: 16px;">
Download Resume (DOCX)
</a>

</div>

<iframe src="/static/resume/resume.pdf" width="100%" height="900px"></iframe>

</div>
